creator: katty@demos.su
text:
After upgrading from 4.2-Stable to 4.4-Stable cvsup-ed 22.11.01 
Generic kernel 4.4-Stable hangs while probing SCSI devices. 
After printing
Waiting 15 seconds for SCSI devices to settle 
i can restart only by power on button. 
Motherboard Intel RD44LX Baseboard with dual PII300 onboard SCSI controller AIC-7880 
Disk -Seagate ST34572W
Starts correctly when load 4.2 Kernel

Fix: 

Unknown
How-To-Repeat: Try to upgrade to 4.4 on this hardware
